summary: Tested the RRDC GO weekly leaderboard feature end-to-end. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests pass for /api/leaderboard/weekly (auth required, Monday-00:00 UTC ISO week_start, shape of top_catchers/top_pokemon/top_walkers/me, is_me flag, catch_rank, walk_rank, legendary/rare counts, unique catcher counts) AND for /api/camper/position meter accumulation (valid 5-200m steps accumulate, >200m GPS jumps filtered out, same-day rows upserted). Frontend: /leaderboard route is auth-protected (redirects to / when no token), 3 tabs (catches/pokemon/distance) render correct data with lb-row-{rank} testids, empty states have lb-empty, trophy button on MapPage navigates to /leaderboard (via React Router), and leaderboard back button returns to /map. 'You' chip highlight & MedalBadge emojis render correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Spawn-toast notifications from Sonner in the top-right can overlay the open-leaderboard-btn and intercept native Playwright clicks (the real user tap area is unobstructed on a real device since toasts dismiss). Element is visible & clickable; bounding box 205,16,34x34. JS dispatch click() always navigates correctly.

issues: Minor: 'me' rank card is only shown for catches and distance tabs (pokemon tab hides it by design) — consider showing your most-caught pokemon on the pokemon tab for consistency, OR add a subtle helper text. Not a blocker.

action_items: No functional fixes required. Optional polish: (1) Consider auto-dismissing or repositioning spawn-toasts so they never sit over the top-bar action buttons on small screens. (2) Add a 'my top pokemon' insight row on the pokemon tab for symmetry.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py _week_start_iso() correctly anchors Monday 00:00 UTC; matches MongoDB aggregation $gte on ISO string caught_at — verified empirically that rows this week are included.
save_camper_position: distance cap (0 < dist_m < 200) is correctly applied; same-day upsert via (camper_id, date_ymd) unique index is idempotent.
weekly_leaderboard: top_catchers iterates catch_rows BEFORE limiting, so me_catch_rank is correct even if the current camper isn't in the top-10 slice — good.
Top walkers aggregation groups by camper_id; names fallback to the copy stored on distance rows when campers doc is missing — robust.
Pokemon top list uses $addToSet then $size for unique_catchers — efficient and correct.
Minor: the `accumulated_expected` soft assertion in tests reflects server-reported step_meters; DB meters match within 10% tolerance — passes reliably.

Minor code smell: in LeaderboardPage.jsx the conditional `me && (tab === 'catches' ? me.catch_rank : tab === 'distance' ? me.walk_rank : null)` silently hides the card for the pokemon tab; intentional but not documented.
test_credentials: Admin: admin / Camp1993. Camper login uses GET /api/groups → GET /api/groups/{code}/campers → POST /api/camper/login {camper_id}. For UI test: camper_id b9d35aaf-90f9-5c06-8674-3f60999d1846 (Colton Ahern, group B01).
seed_data_creation: Temporarily seeded via pytest fixtures: 4 TEST_ catches and 2 camper_distance_daily rows for current week/day — all cleaned up in fixture teardown. For UI verification 2 UI_TEST_ catches + 1 distance row were seeded and cleaned up post-test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Leaderboard endpoint & UI are fully functional and covered. Fixture pattern in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration5_leaderboard.py demonstrates camper auth + direct Mongo seeding with teardown — reuse for future leaderboard-related tests. Note the Sonner toast overlay quirk: use JS click() in Playwright when the MapPage top-bar buttons get briefly covered.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. The only observed hiccup was Playwright's native click on open-leaderboard-btn being intercepted by spawn toasts; this is a test-harness artifact, not a product bug. The button's onClick → nav('/leaderboard') handler works correctly.
